tool_args.label: Proposed 2026 Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan

payload.title: Proposed 2026 Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: A review of the prior year's performance of railroad will be provided to the Committee.
The Agency will present its revised 2026 Financial Plan.
Annual report to the Committee on system-wide reliability and availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.
A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.
The Committee will be advised of the upcoming schedule changes for the Railroad.
A report will be presented to the Committee on Metro-North's ridership trends during 2025.

tool_args.label: Final Review of 2025 Operating Budget Results

payload.event_name: Final Review of 2025 Operating Budget Results
payload.description: A review of the prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance will be presented to the Committee.
A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.
The Committee will be advised of the Agency's key operating performance metrics and indicators for the first half of 2026.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2027 Budget.
The agency will provide the 2026 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.
The agency will provide a comprehensive report on Safety/Security.
A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.
The Committee will be advised of the upcoming schedule changes for the Railroad.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2027 Budget.
The Committee Chair will present a draft Metro-North Committee Work Plan for 2027 that will address initiatives to be reported throughout the year.
The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2027.
The Committee will approve the Proposed Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan for 2027.
A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.
Annual review and approval of the MNR Committee Charter.

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments including safety, operations and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.
payload.subject: President's Report
payload.description: Recurring agenda item for Metro-North Railroad Committee meetings

payload.claim_text: MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.
payload.subject: Police Report
payload.description: Recurring agenda item for Metro-North Railroad Committee meetings

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.
payload.subject: Financial Report
payload.description: Recurring agenda item for Metro-North Railroad Committee meetings

payload.claim_text: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.
payload.subject: Key Performance Metric Report
payload.description: Regular information item for Metro-North Railroad Committee meetings

payload.claim_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications. The list will include items that need a 2/3 vote of the Board for approval.
payload.subject: Procurements
payload.description: Recurring agenda item for Metro-North Railroad Committee meetings
